mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_activity WHERE kg_id = #{kgId} ORDER BY activity_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_activity WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(target_ids, #{classId}, '$') ORDER BY activity_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_activity ( activity_id, kg_id, activity_name, activity_type, activity_time, end_time, location, description, process, target_type, target_ids, max_participants, fee, fee_description, require_signup, signup_deadline, status, publish_time, principal_id, create_by ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, #{kgId}, #{activityName}, #{activityType}, #{activityTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{description}, #{process}, #{targetType}, #{targetIds}, #{maxParticipants}, #{fee}, #{feeDescription}, #{requireSignup}, #{signupDeadline}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{principalId}, #{createBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_activity SET activity_name = #{activityName}, activity_type = #{activityType}, activity_time = #{activityTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, process = #{process}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_ids = #{targetIds}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, fee = #{fee}, fee_description = #{feeDescription}, require_signup = #{requireSignup}, signup_deadline = #{signupDeadline}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime} WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
